chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI PRESENT: Mr. Justice Aqeel Ahmed Abbasi Mr. Justice Abdul Mobeen Lakho C.P. No.D-4337 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE: 1. For order on CMA No.19967/2023 (Urgent). 2. For order on office objection No.1. 3. For order on CMA No.19968/2023 (Exemption). 4. For order on CMA No.19969/2023 (Stay). 5. For hearing of main case. ----------- Dated; 11th September 2023 Mr. Maqbool-ur-Rehman, Advocate for Petitioner. -*-*-*-*-*- 1. Urgency granted. 2. To be complied with. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4&5. We have heard the learned counsel for the petitioner and perused the record of this case. For the reasons to be recorded later on, instant Constitution Petition is dismissed in limine. However, the petitioner will be at liberty to approach the relevant forum for redressal of his grievance, if any, available to him in accordance with law, whereas, respondents may adopt legal course for seeking eviction of the petitioner from subject house. J U D G E J U D G E *Farhan/PS*
